boundaries.title_guess: Spain (Pyrenees, Aragon) & France (Cathar country, Albi, Normandy beaches)

evidence.excerpt: Thursday August 5th ... We are staying on at Ruesta ... Lake Yesa (Spain, Pyrenees)
We drove east ... came down through Aragon ... finally reached Ainsa
We finally reached home at 7. Thomas + Peter were there.

boundaries.notes: Trip is already in progress at the start of this window (page no ~23, volB_index). It continues from the previous window. Runs continuously B_0025 -> B_0046_R where the family reaches home in Birmingham. Window opens mid-trip, so this is the START only by window edge, not a true departure.

boundaries.title_guess: Bath weekend camping with David (Marina Campsite, Roman Baths)

evidence.excerpt: Sunday 29th August. 9.45. we set off, Simon, Eve, John, Charles, Melody 14 & Charlotte 13, to Bath to Camp with David.

boundaries.notes: B_0047_L is a photo/caption page (John's 17th birthday, Barfleur postcard) belonging to the previous Normandy trip; the Bath trip text proper begins on B_0047_R.

boundaries.title_guess: October: Trimpley, the farm & Malvern (John's concerts, Little Malvern Court)

evidence.excerpt: Saturday 16th October. At about 11.45. we set off for Trimpley & then the farm.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0048_R is a mixed page: it opens with the END of the Bath weekend ('Monday 30th August ... We left at 3.15.') then jumps six weeks to begin a new outing ('Saturday 16th October ... we set off for Trimpley & then the farm'). The break falls at the 'Saturday 16th October' heading.
boundaries.notes: October Malvern/Trimpley stretch covers John playing cello at Little Malvern Court and a Malvern concert, with pasted concert programmes at B_0050 (Informal Concert, St Edmund's Hall, 17 Oct 2004). Continues to ~B_0050.

boundaries.title_guess: Day trip to Hanbury Hall (near Droitwich, Worcestershire)

evidence.excerpt: went on a day trip to Hanbury Hall 1801 near Droitwich.
Hanbury Hall parterre. 2002, NT & Nick Moss

boundaries.notes: Described as a 'day trip'; appears as a distinct index entry (page 48, Hanbury Hall) separate from the October Trimpley/Malvern entry (page 46). No explicit departure-from-home or date is given, and B_0051_L is blank, so it is unclear whether this is a standalone outing or a continuation of the October stretch. Low confidence; merge step may fold it in.

boundaries.title_guess: Aston Cantlow (Island Meadow caravan park) & Kinwarton Dovecot

evidence.excerpt: April 9th 2005. At 11 we set off for Aston Cantlow.

boundaries.notes: Clear 2005 departure; dated headings throughout. Runs B_0053_L -> the first part of B_0054_R (Kinwarton Dovecot day, return home Sunday).

boundaries.title_guess: Malvern (collecting Grandma & Helen from Lordswood Rd)

evidence.excerpt: Friday May 27th. Simon + Eve left at 12.40. + then had to go back, at Lordswood Rd, for the name of Grandma's + Helen's b. + b. We are going to pick them up + take them to Malvern.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0054_R is a mixed page: it ends the Aston Cantlow/Kinwarton trip ('We got home at 3.05. Sunday') and then begins a new outing under 'Friday May 27th' ('Simon + Eve left at 12.40 ... take them to Malvern'). The break falls at the 'Friday May 27th' heading.
boundaries.notes: This Malvern trip opens at the end of the window and appears to continue past it (only its first lines are visible). Index page 52 = 'Malvern, Bromyard' (2005).

open_at_end: Trip starting B_0054_R (Friday May 27th 2005, to Malvern collecting Grandma & Helen) is only begun on the last page and continues past this window.
notes: Window B_w02 covers spreads B_0025-B_0054, which fall within volume B's first big book (volB_index, 2003-2005 content). The R-page printed numbers (no field) align with volB_index pages: B_0047_R=45 (Bath), B_0049_R=47, B_0051_R=48 (Hanbury), B_0053_R=51 (Aston Cantlow), B_0054_R=52 (Malvern). NOTE: the book2/book3/book4/book5 index_entries in the bundle are from LATER books in the volume and do NOT correspond to these page_ids; the relevant scaffold here is volB_index. B_0044_R, B_0046_R, B_0048_L photo/blank pages belong to their surrounding trips.
